'''βàöj-th-b-f''' ('''kajathbefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mab|mab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mab|mab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöj-th-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| kajathbefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijathbefoko|thijathbefoko]] || [[word:jijathbefoko|jijathbefoko]] || [[word:shijathbefoko|shijathbefoko]] || [[word:kijathbefoko|kijathbefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujathbefoko|thuthujathbefoko]] || [[word:jujujathbefoko|jujujathbefoko]] || [[word:shushujathbefoko|shushujathbefoko]] || [[word:kukujathbefoko|kukujathbefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujathbefoko|thujathbefoko]] || [[word:jujathbefoko|jujathbefoko]] || [[word:shujathbefoko|shujathbefoko]] || [[word:kujathbefoko|kujathbefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujathbefoko|thujathbefoko]] || [[word:jujathbefoko|jujathbefoko]] || [[word:shujathbefoko|shujathbefoko]] || [[word:kujathbefoko|kujathbefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejathbefoko|thejathbefoko]] || [[word:jejathbefoko|jejathbefoko]] || [[word:shejathbefoko|shejathbefoko]] || [[word:kejathbefoko|kejathbefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojathbefoko|thothojathbefoko]] || [[word:jojojathbefoko|jojojathbefoko]] || [[word:shoshojathbefoko|shoshojathbefoko]] || [[word:kokojathbefoko|kokojathbefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojathbefoko|thojathbefoko]] || [[word:jojathbefoko|jojathbefoko]] || [[word:shojathbefoko|shojathbefoko]] || [[word:kojathbefoko|kojathbefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojathbefoko|thojathbefoko]] || [[word:jojathbefoko|jojathbefoko]] || [[word:shojathbefoko|shojathbefoko]] || [[word:kojathbefoko|kojathbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠjathbefoko|thΟΠjathbefoko]] || [[word:jΟΠjathbefoko|jΟΠjathbefoko]] || [[word:shΟΠjathbefoko|shΟΠjathbefoko]] || [[word:kΟΠjathbefoko|kΟΠjathbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajathbefoko|thathajathbefoko]] || [[word:jajajathbefoko|jajajathbefoko]] || [[word:shashajathbefoko|shashajathbefoko]] || [[word:kakajathbefoko|kakajathbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajathbefoko|thajathbefoko]] || [[word:jajathbefoko|jajathbefoko]] || [[word:shajathbefoko|shajathbefoko]] || [[word:kajathbefoko|kajathbefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajathbefoko|thajathbefoko]] || [[word:jajathbefoko|jajathbefoko]] || [[word:shajathbefoko|shajathbefoko]] || [[word:kajathbefoko|kajathbefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajathbefithi|shajathbefithi]] || [[word:shajathbefiji|shajathbefiji]] || [[word:shajathbefishi|shajathbefishi]] || [[word:shajathbefiki|shajathbefiki]]
